scripts.check: bun build server.ts --target=bun --outfile=/tmp/codex-webui-server-check.js && bun build public/app.js --target=browser --outfile=/tmp/codex-webui-app-check.js
scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/ui-core.test.ts tests/rendering.test.ts tests/folders.test.ts tests/file-search.test.ts tests/codex-icons.test.ts tests/codex-surfaces.test.ts tests/review-service.test.ts tests/profile-service.test.ts tests/profile-security.test.ts tests/server-security.test.ts tests/review-state.test.ts tests/terminal-service.test.ts tests/workspace-context.test.ts
scripts.test:browser: bun tests/browser-smoke.mjs && bun tests/ws-sse-fallback.e2e.mjs && bun tests/chrome-layout.e2e.mjs && bun tests/conversation-native.e2e.mjs && bun tests/composer-native.e2e.mjs && bun tests/composer-autocomplete.e2e.mjs && bun tests/projectless-composer.e2e.mjs && bun tests/terminal-native.e2e.mjs && bun tests/review-turn-selection.e2e.mjs && bun tests/theme-colors.e2e.mjs && bun tests/responsive-panels.e2e.mjs && bun tests/summary-scroll.e2e.mjs && bun tests/mobile-layout.test.mjs && bun tests/mobile-device-mode.e2e.mjs && bun tests/surfaces-browser.mjs && bun tests/password-login.e2e.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: bun tests/malformed-url.e2e.mjs && bun tests/account-api.e2e.mjs && bun tests/approval-e2e.mjs && bun tests/review-api-e2e.mjs
